title: Pattaya、Chon Buri — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Pattaya、Chon Buri的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Pattaya是Chon Buri的一个城市，人口约500,000。A coastal city on the Gulf of Thailand known for its beaches, nightlife, and large expat retirement community with affordable living costs.
